evals.description: Enter explore mode for a vague idea
evals.setup: User wants to think through an idea before committing to a change
evals.expected_output: Should enter explore mode and think through the idea collaboratively
expectations: Checks active model, blocks on Haiku
Asks user which model to use for exploration
Enters a stance of curious thinking partner
Opens multiple interesting directions for user to follow
May read and search codebase for context

evals.description: Explore in context of an existing change
evals.setup: Change add-dark-mode exists with some artifacts
evals.expected_output: Should explore in context of that change
expectations: Reads existing change artifacts for context
Thinks through design decisions and tradeoffs
Does NOT write code or advance the workflow
Can create OpenSpec artifacts (proposals, specs) if user asks

evals.expected_output: Should stop immediately with a helpful message
expectations: Detects Haiku model from system context
Suggests switching to Sonnet or Opus

should_trigger: help me think about the auth system
I want to explore ideas before building
think through postgres vs sqlite for this
think with me about this feature
I want to investigate the codebase structure
